title: Get M 125 Twin 10's - Cotton Co. Promotions
description: FULL SCHEDULE — THURSDAY: Parking 4:00PM–10:00PM. FRIDAY: Gates Open 8:00AM, Registration 10:00AM, Test & Tune ($40) 1:00PM, R1 Gamblers 4:00PM. SATURDAY: Gates Open 8:00AM, Time Run 9:00AM, R1 Eliminations to Follow. SUNDAY: Gates Open 7:00AM, RFC Service 8:00AM, R1 Eliminations 9:00AM. | PAYOUTS — Friday Gamblers: $2,000 to win, $1,000 runner-up, $400 semi-finals, $200 quarter-finals. Double entries allowed. | Saturday & Sunday Mains (each): $10,000 to win, $2,250 runner-up, $500 semi-finals, $250 quarter-finals, $150 5th Rd win, $100 4th Rd win, $50 3rd Rd win. $100 Buyback each day. Round money does NOT compound. | 32 Car Shootout (Saturday Night): $250 entry, $5,000 to win, 1,000 runner-up. | Bottom Bulb Elite 25 (Kingston, OK – EFT sponsor): Only 25 BOGO entries sold. $1,500 bonus Sat & Sun. Bottom Bulb winner joins next round with Top Bulb earning round money. | Only 125 pre-entries sold — every entry is doubled! Registration opens March 1, 2026. All registrations at www.raceccrp.com. $200 due at pre-entry to lock in spot, $149 balance due at facility. Gate entries (if not sold out) $449. No refunds if event canceled (entries can be sold by racers). | Sponsors: McLarren Electric, Laris Motorsports Insurance / Hydration Station, Porta-Tree Timing Systems, Sunset Performance Engines, Cook Motor Co. (Wichita Falls, TX), EFT (Kingston, OK). | General rules: All races run on 1/8 mile. Ladder at 16 cars or less with best previous reaction time getting lane choice. 8.00 and faster in SP. No deep staging. RPM Limit Down Track strictly prohibited. No gold cards. No refunds. 3.5% fee on credit card charges. Checks/cash accepted.
raw_driver_fee: $349 BOGO (Buy One Get One) for Saturday & Sunday mains; $75 entry / $45 buyback for Friday Gamblers; $250 entry for 32 Car Shootout (Sat Night); $15/day or $40 weekend crew fee

title: Alley Cat Racing Presents Texas Shootout's Grudge Racing
description: ADDRESS: 11620 N. Lake Houston Parkway, 77044. | ALSO WELCOMES: Grudge Racing & Test n Tune. | LIVE MUSIC & CONCESSIONS. | Social TikTok: @just4welcome_ | CLASS DETAILS — 7.50 FULLSIZE: $3K to win, SUVs allowed, Sportsman tree, Foot brake/2step OK, No delay box, No wheelie bars, No street tires, 315 or smaller, 1st Rd. buy back. | 6.50 FULLSIZE: $3K to win, Pro tree, Trans brake/2step, Any power adder, No delay box, No street tires, No wheelie bars, 315 or smaller, 1st Rd. buy back. | 5.30 LIL DAWG: $2K guaranteed on top, No time slips, Must be door car, No wheelie bars, No throttle stops, Off-road tire, Any power adder, 315 or smaller. | DAILY DRIVER N/A: $2K to win, No street tires, No times shown, Overdrive transmission, Stock suspension location, Stock firewall, Foot brake/2step OK, Pro tree, Factory appearing in/out, 10 car minimum.
